field.defaultValue: INSERT INTO dw.dim_customer (customer_id, email, first_name, last_name, loyalty_tier, country_iso2, updated_at, ingested_at) VALUES (:customer_id, :email, :first_name, :last_name, :loyalty_tier, :country_iso2, :updated_at, :ingested_at) ON CONFLICT (customer_id) DO UPDATE SET email = EXCLUDED.email, first_name = EXCLUDED.first_name, last_name = EXCLUDED.last_name, loyalty_tier = EXCLUDED.loyalty_tier, country_iso2 = EXCLUDED.country_iso2, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at, ingested_at = EXCLUDED.ingested_at
